title: Bottom row: N M
text: man man man and and and now now now men men men come come come name name name money money money

tips.text: N and M are right index/middle finger reaches DOWN
Common letters — N and M appear in 90% of sentences

tips.target: man man man and and and now now now men

tips.text: After this lesson, you know all 26 letters

tips.target: men men come come come name name name money money money

character_tips.anna: N and M complete your alphabet. From here, you can type anything.
character_tips.maxim: All 26 letters online. The rest is practice.
character_tips.klavochka: Every letter your friend now, my sunshine ☀️
